metadata.title: Retrieval Trace Workspace
metadata.subtitle: Evidence-heavy ingest fixture
metadata.description: A retrieval-oriented packet with denser evidence and citation structure than the default workspace.
watchFor: Evidence should cluster around the answer without flattening into a single card stack.
Citations should remain legible and locally ordered while preserving relation pressure.
The figure should stay attached to the retrieval chain rather than being exiled to a side panel.

guideSteps.label: Retrieval claim
guideSteps.description: The main retrieval statement the workspace is trying to stabilize.

guideSteps.label: Trace evidence
guideSteps.description: Follow this evidence chain through figure and citation support.

guideSteps.label: Latency risk
guideSteps.description: Low-confidence latency drift should stay visible without overwhelming the answer.

tasks.title: Trace support for the claim
tasks.prompt: Follow the retrieval claim through its strongest evidence and citation anchors.

tasks.title: Find the weakest region
tasks.prompt: Inspect the latency contradiction and the evidence it destabilizes.

claim.title: Retrieval trace remains co-visible
claim.statement: Dense retrieval evidence should stay navigable without collapsing into a rigid bibliography stack.

answerBlocks.text: The runtime keeps answer and trace nodes co-visible while still allowing citation gravity and focus shifts.
Fallback retrieval remains weaker and should read as a lower-confidence basin rather than an equal column.

evidence.text: Trace spans remain near the claim when relation forces and reading-order targets agree.
Citation-linked retrieval scores preserve local order under pan, focus, and replay.
Fallback evidence stays readable but should remain visibly softer than the primary trace.
Host bridge overlays can attach to solved retrieval nodes without taking over layout ownership.

contradictions.text: Late retrieval hops can scatter evidence far enough to break the reading trace.
A purely citation-driven layout can overfit relevance scores and obscure bridge nodes.
